caption: A news broadcast features a panel of three men seated at a long white table in New Delhi, as indicated by the text "DECEMBER 2023 | NEW DELHI" on the background banner. On the left, a man in a white shirt and glasses is seated; in the center, a man wears a grey jacket and a textured cap; on the right, a man in a black vest and white shirt sits. The frames include on-screen news graphics, featuring red banners with white text that read "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजय चौधरी" and a timestamp of "10:08 PM." Side panels identify "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "संतोष सुमन," and "सुमित कुमार" alongside their respective photos. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है." As the sequence progresses, the camera remains static, but the red banner at the top updates in the bottom-right frame to read "नीतीश को तेजस्वी," while other graphic elements remain consistent across the scene.
